title: onychium cryptogrammoides subsp. fragile
intro: Onychium cryptogrammoides subsp. fragile, also known as the Himalayan Onychium, is a rare and endangered species of fern native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, pain, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Onychium cryptogrammoides subsp. fragile include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
